description: Staff cannot infer authority from insurance subscriber, guarantor, household, or prior-message status — the resolution basis vocabulary structurally excludes them.

cases.name: insurance-subscriber status can never carry the resolution (EX-1)
guarantor status can never carry the resolution (EX-1)
household membership can never carry the resolution (EX-1)
whoever messaged last can never carry the resolution (EX-1)
